subcategory: feature card with animated background tiles
use_cases: Displaying feature highlights with animated decorative backgrounds on landing pages
Creating interactive card-based navigation in product dashboards
Showcasing product or service previews with dynamic visual effects
Building attention-grabbing CTA sections with subtle tile animations
Designing content cards with real-time animated backgrounds for modern web apps
ai_summary: A feature card component with a dynamic animated grid background using staggered tile opacity animations. The card includes a title with an inline tag badge, descriptive text, and a styled call-to-action button with hover effects. Supports dark mode with proper color transitions and includes decorative animated tiles that fade in and out to create visual interest.
